name: tts-cpp
description: Text-to-speech inference in pure C++/ggml. Ships Resemble Chatterbox (Turbo + Multilingual variants) and Supertonic engines under a unified Engine API. Sourced from tetherto/qvac-ext-lib-whisper.cpp's tts-cpp/ subfolder. This pin (master HEAD 46921668, PR #65) brings QVAC-19557 S3TokenizerV2 host-mirror elimination: build_encoder_ctx streams the ~458 MB encoder weights straight from the GGUF into the backend buffer (8 MiB chunks, no host std::vector mirror), dropping the ~900 MB dual-residency that dominated the chatterbox first-synth peak — on-device the iOS first-test peak falls 3184->2772 MB (under the ~3 GB jetsam budget; weights bit-identical). Layered on 1cc2d383 (QVAC-21118 chunk-streaming CFM-step floor, PR #62), a679c7e7 (QVAC-19557 streamed GGUF loads + selectable KV-cache dtype, PR #43), and the b95ad447 base (QVAC-20616 EOS robustness PR #53 + QVAC-20557 Supertonic Android GPU PR #54). Consumes the ggml-speech port.
